# Dagster CI (`ci-dagster.yml`)

**Triggers**: `pull_request`, `push`

```mermaid
graph TD
    classDef gate fill:#4a9eff,stroke:#2563eb,color:#fff
    classDef plumbing fill:#a78bfa,stroke:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    classDef test fill:#34d399,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
    classDef collation fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
    classDef sideeffect fill:#f87171,stroke:#dc2626,color:#fff

    changes{{"Determine need to run dagster checks"}}
    dagster["Dagster tests<br/><i>matrix: dynamic</i>"]
    dagster_tests[["Dagster Tests Pass"]]

    changes -->|dagster| dagster
    dagster --> dagster_tests

    class changes gate
    class dagster test
    class dagster_tests collation
```

## Legend

| Shape        | Color  | Meaning                   |
| ------------ | ------ | ------------------------- |
| Hexagon      | Blue   | Gate / change detection   |
| Stadium      | Purple | Plumbing / matrix builder |
| Rectangle    | Green  | Test / core work          |
| Subroutine   | Yellow | Collation / status gate   |
| Rounded rect | Red    | Side effect / snapshots   |

Edge labels show the change-detection output that gates the job.

## Job details

| Job             | Depends on | Condition | Matrix  |
| --------------- | ---------- | --------- | ------- |
| `changes`       | -          | -         | -       |
| `dagster`       | changes    | dagster   | dynamic |
| `dagster_tests` | dagster    | -         | -       |
